tasks.label: Run LinuxLabX
args: if [[ -x build/LinuxLabX.app/Contents/MacOS/LinuxLabX ]]; then build/LinuxLabX.app/Contents/MacOS/LinuxLabX; elif [[ -x build/LinuxLabX ]]; then build/LinuxLabX; elif [[ -x build/Release/LinuxLabX.exe ]]; then build/Release/LinuxLabX.exe; elif [[ -x build/LinuxLabX.exe ]]; then build/LinuxLabX.exe; else echo 'LinuxLabX executable not found. Run CMake Build first.'; exit 1; fi
